rankings.title: The Price of Market Freedom: India's Farm Laws Pass-and-Repeal as a Symmetric Natural Experiment on Agricultural Market Deregulation
conditions: showing a real first stage in trading behavior or mandi participation
restricting to commodities/states where the laws plausibly mattered
demonstrating reversibility around the stay/repeal
not just generic time-series breaks
